channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Powell, Bessent Warn Banks About Security Risks From Anthropic's Mythos AI: Bloomberg
item.description: Treasury and Federal Reserve officials reportedly alerted banks to cybersecurity risks tied to Anthropic’s advanced new Mythos AI model.

item.title: Trump-Linked WLFI Erases $427 Million From Market Cap on DeFi Loan, Token Unlock Proposal
item.description: Onlookers expressed concerns that Dolomite’s protocol could be stuck with bad debt if World Liberty’s loans were unwound.

item.title: Star Xu calls CZ a ‘liar’ as founders of world’s largest crypto exchanges argue over past allegations
item.description: The dispute between the crypto exchange founders, which included a $1 billion wager from CZ, revives allegations dating back 11 years to Zhao’s time at OKCoin.

item.title: BitTensor AI Token Plunges as Top Builder Departs Over Decentralization Doubts
item.description: BitTensor's native token, TAO, has fallen more than 18% amid public fallout between a leading subnet operator and the AI network's founder.

item.title: The magic word for digital assets adoption and success: choice
item.description: For the digital asset ecosystem of the future to flourish, investors need options, explains Sullivan.

item.title: Bittensor's TAO risks 45% dip amid 'decentralization theater' accusation
item.description: TAO drops 30% from its weekly high, confirming fractal setups that projected deeper downside targets for the token in the past.

item.title: Bitcoin hits $73K as cool US CPI data shows 60-year record gas price hike
item.description: Bitcoin saw a fresh attempt to hit new local highs on the back of lower-than-expected US CPI data, despite a giant gas-price increase.

item.title: White House warns staff as Iran bets add to growing insider trading concerns
item.description: Reuters reported that White House staff were warned against using confidential information after suspicious Iran-linked oil futures bets and fresh scrutiny of prediction markets.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bank of France calls for tougher MiCA limits on stablecoin payments
item.description: A Bank of France official called for tighter MiCA rules on non-euro stablecoins as lawmakers advance reporting requirements for self-custodial crypto wallets above 5,000 euros.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Breaks $73K as Strategy's STRC Bid Grows
item.description: Strategy's STRC is buoying the Bitcoin bid, Galaxy stock is ripping, and Scott Bessent told the Senate to pass the Clarity Act—with Brian Armstrong chiming in.

item.title: Bitcoin analysis sees $55K BTC price 'iron bottom' by December 2026
item.description: New BTC price analysis predicted that the bear market would bottom out later in the year, before beginning a "two-year accumulation phase."

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Hedera (HBAR) drops 1.9%, leading index lower
item.description: Cardando (ADA), down 1.3% from Thursday, was also among the underperformers.

item.title: Trump-backed WLFI token drops 12% to record lows after team defends multi-million lending position
item.description: World Liberty Financial responded to CoinDesk's reporting by saying it would "simply supply more collateral" if markets moved against it, a statement that did not reassure holders.

item.title: Binance offers UAE staff temporary relocation as Middle East conflict disrupts region
item.description: The crypto exchange said its operations in the United Arab Emirates remain unchanged and that many employees have chosen to remain

item.title: Bitcoin gains after core CPI rose a less-than-forecast 0.2% in March.
item.description: Headline inflation rose 0.9% last month, driven by the sharp rise in energy costs due to the Iran war.

item.title: Introducing, #BuildWithYou: Crypto Confession What’s one lesson crypto taught you? 3 simple steps: 👉 Follow @binance + RT this 👉 Share one lesson crypto has taught you with #BuildWithYou 👉 Complete the survey → binance.com/en/survey/b597… Top 20 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE85NWJ1MU15aTI3Y3Y4bHNCX2U2bUwzT0Rrb1dqNjRjeml5N05LaEk1OVFYbGNUZXVOdGdJb3FpMGpKdFpxVWZLalhrUnRkN0p2VmRpdGNrSzBOU2pS?oc=5" target="_blank">Introducing, #BuildWithYou: Crypto Confess…

item.title: Lost in all the fanfare of $MSBT launching was that The Bitcoin After Dark ETF $NGHT also launched Wed. And it was meh volume first day but big jump on Day Two. Will be fun to compare these two, Day vs Night over the months and years. Our research via - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE8xd1k2YUY3NVRuQjFsTVdNTFRQalloVU80Yi1TNVI2Z0lGaW9qLXJKTzctRm1LVTIzNGYwV1BBQVFzb3ZWb2QzOGJPYzFwUFgxa0JqZnFsS0pjUjNlTkxDdWVYdXk?oc=5" target="_blank">Lost in all the fanfare of $MSB…

item.title: Bitget rolls out SpaceX-linked pre-IPO proxy with Republic
item.description: Bitget’s IPO Prime will debut with preSPAX, a Republic-issued token tied to SpaceX’s post-IPO performance rather than direct ownership of the company’s shares.

item.title: Institutions' bitcoin positioning lacks conviction; CPI, Iran talks might help
item.description: Institutions are betting on the bitcoin price hitting $80,000 through call options, but they are also buying downside protection.

item.title: World Liberty signals phased WLFI unlock vote after early holder backlash
item.description: World Liberty said its WLFI unlock proposal will go through community input before a formal vote, outlining a phased vesting plan rather than a full token release.

item.title: Aethir halts bridge exploit, promises compensation after $90K loss
item.description: Aethir said it halted a bridge exploit on its Ethereum-linked contracts, limiting losses to under $90,000 after PeckShield estimated $400,000 in damages.

item.title: Covenant AI exits Bittensor over ‘decentralization theatre,’ TAO drops 18%
item.description: Covenant AI said it was leaving Bittensor due to its overreaching control on subnets and their large-scale TAO token sales, but Bittensor’s founder denied all allegations.

item.title: Bitcoin holds steady as inflation data looms, bittensor drama unfolds
item.description: Traders face a pivotal Friday as narrowing volatility on bitcoin's chart hints at a massive price move while bittensor faces a high-profile developer exit.

item.title: The fake website that led to an arrest: Inside the CoinDCX impersonation case
item.description: A spoofed CoinDCX site sparked a 7.16 million rupee fraud case, triggering arrests before a court ruled the exchange was impersonated

item.title: Hong Kong grants first stablecoin licenses to Anchorpoint and HSBC
item.description: Hong Kong has issued its first stablecoin issuer licenses, approving Anchorpoint Financial and HSBC’s Hong Kong banking arm under its new regime.

item.title: HSBC and Standard Chartered-led group land Hong Kong’s first stablecoin licenses
item.description: The approvals by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, the territory's central bank, mark the first batch under the Stablecoins Ordinance, which took effect in August 2025.

item.title: XRP adjacent Flare proposes protocol-level MEV capture and 40% inflation cut
item.description: The proposal would move block building away from individual validators, create a revenue entity called FIRE to buy and burn FLR, and reduce annual token inflation to 3%.

item.title: David Bailey’s bitcoin holder Nakamoto is trying to stay on Nasdaq with a reverse stock split
item.description: The stock has plunged roughly 99% from its May 2025 peak as pressure builds on the bitcoin treasury firm.

item.title: Japan moves to classify cryptocurrencies as financial products
item.description: The new rules ban insider trading, require issuers to publish annual disclosures, and impose stricter penalties: up to 10 years in prison and 10 million yen in fines for operating without registration.

item.title: BREAKING: Japan’s cabinet has just approved a bill reclassifying crypto from a payment method to a financial product. Japan is the world’s 5th-largest economy, and this regulatory clarity will remove uncertainty and boost confidence among investors. The bill - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE44MXJ1SUVZR2hndzBZeEdJZkRRX2dRYV9rWVFvRmxzR25JU0FKa3JjaUlmYXdrVzBQNXQwcFBoUDhLQ0ZDbEw5SGp6cFJob0owaWNtc1puMjJERHp1bzNZcDRZUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Japan’s cabinet has ju…

item.title: CZ hopes in 5 years people stop talking about crypto and just use it
item.description: Some industry insiders speculate the crypto sector may be just one market cycle away from full-scale mainstream adoption.

item.title: XRP may be less exposed to quantum computer threats than bitcoin, experts say
item.description: XRP’s design leaves a smaller share of its supply exposed to future quantum attacks than Bitcoin’s, experts said, pointing to additional XRPL features that stand out.

item.title: Japan approves bill to classify crypto as financial instruments
item.description: Japan tightens oversight with insider-trading bans and new disclosure rules as crypto markets attract more institutional participation.

item.title: BlackRock Bitcoin ETF sees $269M inflows, best day since early March
item.description: Fidelity and Morgan Stanley’s Bitcoin ETFs also saw a combined $68.2 million in inflows, while four other Bitcoin ETFs also tallied inflows on Thursday.

item.title: XRP edges higher to $1.35 on breakout, but bullish momentum still lacks
item.description: Strong volume pushed price above $1.34, though weak fundamentals and overhead resistance continue to cap follow-through.

item.title: ETH, SOL, DOGE slide as Bitcoin fails to break $73,000 for the third time since the ceasefire
item.description: The level that has capped every rally during the six-week war remains intact, with analysts saying $75,000 needs to break before the market enters a genuine bullish phase.

item.title: Elon Musk’s xAI sues Colorado arguing its AI rules restrict speech
item.description: xAI argues that the law could force Grok to align with state-defined standards, which would conflict with its goal of “maximally truth-seeking” AI.

item.title: x402 protocol adds usage-based pricing for AI compute requests
item.description: The upgrade from flat fees to variable pricing is designed to support the use of AI agents for LLM inference, compute and data queries.

item.title: Quantum-safe bitcoin now possible without a soft fork, but costs $200 a pop, new research shows
item.description: A new scheme from a StarkWare researcher works under existing consensus rules, offering an emergency fallback while BIP-360 awaits activation.

item.title: Bitcoin can be made quantum-safe without protocol upgrade: Researcher
item.description: A proposed workaround could enable quantum-resistant Bitcoin transactions without a protocol change, but high compute costs limit real-world use.

item.title: OKX and HashKey invest in new Vietnam exchange ahead of crypto licensing push
item.description: The partnership will help the exchange meet Vietnam's $380 million capital requirement to enter a government pilot program aimed at licensing local platforms and curbing offshore trading.

item.title: OKX Ventures, HashKey back VPBank-linked CAEX for Vietnam crypto pilot push
item.description: OKX Ventures and HashKey are buying into VPBank-backed CAEX as Vietnam’s strict crypto pilot pushes offshore exchanges toward a challenging onshore licensing regime.

item.title: Mythos AI threat prompts Bessent, Powell to convene bank CEOs for urgent talks
item.description: Mythos can rapidly spot software flaws and craft sophisticated exploits, raising fears of systemic risks in the banking system.

item.title: Bitmine uplists to NYSE as share buyback is increased to $4B
item.description: A listing on the NYSE requires a company to meet strict requirements covering financial health, share distribution and corporate governance.

item.title: 'Operation Atlantic': US and UK Team With Firms to Trace, Freeze Millions in Stolen Crypto
item.description: Crypto firms like Coinbase and Kraken teamed up with government agencies to trace and freeze millions in funds tied to crypto scams and fraud.

item.title: TD Cuts Bitcoin Giant Strategy's Price Target, Calls Ethereum Treasury Sharplink a ‘Buy’
item.description: TD Cowen remains positive on $55 billion Bitcoin treasury pioneer Strategy, despite trimming its price target yet again.

item.title: . @cz_binance says that quantum computing may break existing crypto, and that BTC may need to fork to quantum-resistant cryptography. "Quantum may break the existing encryption mechanisms, but with quantum computing there will be new encryption algo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTFA2aDBjZk1taXBZaHgyNEMyc2ZPVlRvclRkbXhwd3h3Y2Y1R0NXdU5HQ1RIeEVuYmtvRktBcm1pdnd3UVF0NTJ5Sl9HOTBLRW1yT1pzUnNMMWo?oc=5" target="_blank">. @cz_binance says that quantum computing may b…

item.title: 'AI Should Advance Mankind, Not Destroy It': Why Florida Is Taking Aim at OpenAI
item.description: The Florida attorney general's probe into AI giant OpenAI cites national security and child safety risks tied to ChatGPT.

item.title: Pepe May Follow Dogecoin to Wall Street—But ETF Investors Aren't Buying Meme Hype
item.description: There's now an application for a Pepe ETF, but Dogecoin funds have generated tepid inflows, according to CoinShares' James Butterfill

item.title: Bitcoin tops $72,000, but Circle and Bullish drop sharply after downgrades
item.description: Eased Middle East tensions pushed crypto prices and U.S. stocks sizable hjigher.

item.title: These 3 crypto stocks could actually beat bitcoin ETFs, says TD Cowen
item.description: Analyst Lance Vitanza is betting that digital asset treasury"companies like Nakamoto, Sharplink and Strive can outperform standard crypto ETFs by aggressively stacking coins and capturing staking yields.

item.title: JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's Amy Oldenburg announces their spot Bitcoin ETF launch had their "best first day of trading for any of our ETFs" 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1fdW4zeUJIaVFtS3UyYkF2N3BhcFZNWkF5VFNnSFhpSHkxVDJsWEFiQlBHaUtLdDl6emNyX0VVT2NaMmt1YVgzc05rUFpjekZpc056b0s1UlgtUXMybzh2RjdERVpuWkk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's A…

item.title: OpenAI Plans Advanced Cybersecurity Product—With 'Trusted Access' Only
item.description: Both OpenAI and Anthropic are restricting access to their most powerful cybersecurity capabilities, releasing them only to vetted organizations.

item.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Open Interest Rises, Signaling Renewed Risk Appetite: CryptoQuant
item.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum are trading higher as open interest rises, providing some optimism about investors' risk-on appetite.

item.title: YouTube Now Lets You Create Your Own AI Deepfakes
item.description: The new YouTube Shorts feature lets creators generate short videos using a realistic digital recreation of their own face and voice.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin developer Avihu Levy introduces "Quantum-Safe Bitcoin Transactions Without Softforks" 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1NYU9HeXp2TFBPVkpUNGFCVmV5dmNlYlNCNW4zR0ZqNXh1ajJoS3RkYVpZaXJ4NkIzTk1YU0FFYnVUY1o0a3dUb2ZsQm9XUWJILWQ0NHRWYTNSMzVkMTNGWjdVZTdPdjA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin developer …

item.title: OpenAI Says Enterprise AI Is Already 40% of Its Revenue Amid ‘Agentic Workflow’ Shift
item.description: OpenAI CRO Denise Dresser says enterprise now makes up more than 40% of the company's revenue as companies turn to teams of agents.

item.title: Meta, CoreWeave Shares Rise After Expanding $21 Billion AI Cloud Deal
item.description: Both Meta and CoreWeave logged stock gains Thursday after expanding their existing AI deal, now valued at $21 billion.

item.title: Google's PaperOrchestra AI Converts Lab Notes Into Publication-Ready Research Papers
item.description: The framework automates the complex process of transforming raw research materials into polished academic manuscripts.
